data.name: DevelopmentModeInstructions
data.value: It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users. For local debugging, enable the Development environment by setting the DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT environment variable to Development and restarting the app.

data.name: DevelopmentModeLead
data.value: Swapping to the Development environment displays detailed information about the error that occurred.

data.name: DevelopmentModeWarning
data.value: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications.

data.name: ErrorMessage
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.
